access_token.description: Rollbar API access token, sent as the X-Rollbar-Access-Token header. Never logged.

base_url.description: Rollbar API base URL override for tests or proxies.

uuid.description: Occurrence UUID for the item_by_uuid stream.

item_id.description: Rollbar item ID for item detail, item occurrence, and item mutation endpoints.

counter.description: Project-local Rollbar item counter for item_by_counter.

job_id.description: Rollbar RQL or person-deletion job ID.

project_id.description: Rollbar project ID for project-scoped streams and writes.

environment.description: Rollbar environment for version and session replay streams.

session_id.description: Rollbar session ID for session replay endpoints.

replay_id.description: Rollbar replay ID for session replay endpoints.

version.description: Application code version for Rollbar version streams.

event.description: Version item event filter required by Rollbar for version_items.
